query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_services,
  SUM(monthlyCost) AS total_monthly_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost) * 12, 2) AS total_annual_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(monthlyCost), 2) AS avg_monthly_cost,
  MIN(monthlyCost) AS min_monthly_cost,
  MAX(monthlyCost) AS max_monthly_cost,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) AS total_monthly_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue) * 12, 2) AS total_annual_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost), 2) AS total_monthly_margin,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost) * 12, 2) AS total_annual_margin,
  ROUND(AVG(marginPercent), 2) AS avg_margin_percent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'archived' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS archived_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'flagged_for_termination' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flagged_count
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination');
